nasb.text: You have devised a shameful thing for your house By cutting off many peoples; So you are sinning against yourself.

esv.text: You have devised shame for your house by cutting off many peoples; you have forfeited your life.

cnv.text: 你剪除多國的民，反害了自己； 你所謀算的，使你的家蒙羞。

ccb.text: 你们阴谋毁灭各族， 以致自辱己家，自害己命。
